name: Juice Shop TN — parameterised login query (no SQLi)

provenance.note: True-negative control: a parameterised login query (no string interpolation). Verifies the analyzer does not flag safe query-building near a known SQLi hotspot.

notes: Both sides bind req.body.email / req.body.password via :email / :password replacements; the diff normalises the bound email with .trim() (a behavioural-but-safe change). No string interpolation, no vulnerability introduced — this is the safe counterpart to js01 and must produce zero findings.
